Local loLista

If Empty(ThisForm.cntMvt1.getData1.value)
		Messagebox('Data Inicial Inválida!!!',0+48,'')
		ThisForm.cntMvt1.getData1.SetFocus
		Return 0
	EndIf

		Return 0
